{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Song of Falling Ash
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Song of Falling Ash]] is a [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Song of Falling Ash]] is a technique from a [[Path]] of destruction.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
